Ibn Haldun Academy will Focus on “Cultural Atmosphere” This Year

18.03.2025

Ibn Haldun Academy will bring together university students from all over Turkey in a feast of thought with the theme of “Developing Culture and Atmosphere” in its third year.

The program of Ibn Haldun Academy, which will be organized for the 3rd time this year by our Department of Corporate Communication and Promotion, has been announced and registrations have started. Ibn Haldun Academy will once again bring together many prominent figures from various fields of social sciences with young university students from all over Turkey this year.

In 2023, the Ibn Haldun Academy was held with the theme of "Aesthetics," and in 2024, with the theme of "Diluted Times." The third program, which will take place from April 19 to May 24, 2025, will feature seminars and conference sessions under the theme of "Developing Culture and Atmosphere."

Additionally, participants who rank in the essay competition organized within the context of the theme will be eligible for the Ibn Haldun Academy Incentive Awards.

Registrations for the Academy, which allows face-to-face participation for those in Istanbul and simultaneous online participation for those from Anatolia, are limited in quota.

For detailed information and registration:

https://ibnhaldunakademi.com
